settings.content: Designed in collaboration with Bentley Motors and your toddler’s needs in mind, the Bentley 6-in-1 Stroller / Tricycle is the perfect combination of elegance and function.

settings.title: HOW TO ASSEMBLE
settings.content: Every tool you need to put together your new Bentley Trike comes neatly organized in your box. Simply follow these simple steps.

settings.title: SPARE PARTS
settings.content: Every journey deserves to be seamless. If any part of your Bentley Trike needs replacing, continue the experience by ordering an official Bentley spare part here.

settings.title: WARRANTY
settings.content:
If you experience any issues with your Bentley Trike within the 2-year warranty period, we’re here to ensure a seamless solution. Simply enter your details in the form below, and our team will assist you promptly.

Please note : Warranty coverage applies exclusively to purchases made directly from us. If purchased elsewhere, kindly reach out to the original retailer for assistance

settings.title: Luxury in Every Detail
settings.content: Inspired by the Bentley Continental GT, a luxury limited edition car designed by the famous Bentley Motors LTD. The Bentley Mulliner Trike for kids is an exceptional, luxurious tricycle combining style, comfort, and functionality. Designed with utmost attention to detail, this tricycle is perfect for children who appreciate the finer things in life.

settings.text: Signature Features
Unparalleled Design

settings.content: More than a tricycle—this is the most refined stroller-trike ever created. Designed for those who expect excellence at every stage, the Bentley Trike brings together innovation, comfort, and effortless style.

settings.title: Iconic Mulliner Wheels
settings.text: Air-filled tires modeled after the Continental GT Mulliner offer a quiet, effortless glide, giving your child a smooth, stable ride, while turning every walk into a statement of luxury for parents.

settings.title: Handcrafted Diamond-Quilted Seats
settings.text: Wrapped in Bentley’s signature Double Diamond stitching, the padded seat and embroidered headrest deliver first-class comfort for your little passenger.

settings.title: Signature Emblem
settings.text: The Bentley logo is a symbol of craftsmanship. It reflects your taste for excellence while introducing your child to a world of refined design from the very beginning.

settings.title: Quilted Bag for Mom
settings.text: A refined companion for every stroll. Quilted, easy to clean, and thoughtfully designed for comfort, style, and everyday practicality.

settings.title: Bentley-Engineered Pedals
settings.text: Crafted after Bentley performance pedals, these anti-slip footrests support your child’s early coordination and balance, giving them the confidence to pedal like a pro with every ride.

settings.title: One-Touch Magnetic Buckle System
settings.text: The Bentley-labeled magnetic buckle and 5-point harness offer easy, one-handed safety, making outings easier for parents while the five-point harness keeps your child snug and safe in comfort.

settings.title: Leather Touchpoints
settings.text: Hand-stitched vegan leather accents on the handlebar, guard, and steering bar add comfort and class at every grip, ensuring that every touchpoint feels intentionally premium.

settings.title: Designed by Bentley. Engineered for Childhood.
One Trike. Six Stages. Endless Luxury.
Cross-Stitched Seats
settings.text: Comfortable, high-quality cross-stitched seats along with a UV blocking heavy-duty canopy to keep your baby safe and comfortable.

settings.title: The Bentley Badge
settings.text: A chrome emblem at the hood of the trike is modeled after the Bentley Chrome emblem found on the Continental GT cars. It represents our commitment to luxury and perfection in each trike.

settings.title: Handlebar Grips
settings.text: This trike carries forward a signature touch of luxury with leather inserts on the handlebar grips, safety guard, and parent remote control — ensuring comfort and elegance in every ride.

settings.title: Parent's Bag
settings.text: Offers stylish storage for all your essentials. With a sleek design that complements your Bentley Trike, it features ample space for snacks, toys, and personal items. It keeps everything within reach during your strolls.

settings.title: Replica Continental GT Mulliner Wheels
settings.text:
The tricycle’s wheels precisely replicate the iconic Mulliner GT rims, complete with the Bentley logo at the center and "Bentley Mulliner" engraving.

For an exclusive touch, the self-leveling wheel cap keeps the Bentley "B" upright as it moves — a true masterpiece in motion.

settings.title: Anti-Slide Pedals
settings.text: The new metal pedals with anti-slide surface design to prevent accidents.

settings.title: Premium Comfort Seat
settings.text: Cross-stitched padding keeps your child cozy, while the UV canopy shields them for a smoother, safer ride.

settings.title: Signature Emblem
settings.text: The Bentley logo is a symbol of craftsmanship. It reflects your taste for excellence while introducing your child to a world of refined design from the very beginning.

settings.title: Elegant Essentials Bag
settings.text: Designed to match your Bentley Trike, this sleek, spacious bag keeps your must-haves organized so you stroll in style, hands-free and hassle-free.

settings.title: Magnetic Buckle
settings.text: The up-to-date "Bentley" labeled magnetic buckle combined with the elastic 5-point belt ensures optimal safety and trust from one hand and the simplicity of usage from another.

settings.title: Leather Touchpoints
settings.text: Hand-stitched vegan leather accents on the handlebar, guard, and steering bar add comfort and class at every grip, ensuring that every touchpoint feels intentionally premium.

settings.title: Iconic Wheels
settings.text: Air-filled tires modeled after the Bentley Cars offer a quiet, effortless glide, giving your child a smooth, stable ride, while turning every walk into a statement of luxury for parents.

settings.title: Bentley-Engineered Pedals
settings.text: Crafted after Bentley performance pedals, these anti-slip footrests support your child’s early coordination and balance, giving them the confidence to pedal like a pro with every ride.

settings.heading: Designed to Grow with Your Child
settings.sub_heading: A luxurious aesthetic option for parents looking to keep their child safe and comfortable, while giving them room to learn over the course of their early years.

settings.text: Explore Our Bentley Collection

settings.content:
Experience luxury at every turn with the Officially Licensed Bentley Collection.
Each product embodies elegance, craftsmanship, and innovation.

settings.text: Share the Legacy

settings.content: Capture the elegance of your little one’s adventures and tag #BentleyTrike to be part of our global community.
